rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. CP III RINCON TOWERS, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 9, 2024 line 1. PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on the respondent on file. Both proofs of service on file are as to Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP, not a party to this action. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON VS. ALBERT H WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Lack Of Prosecution; Memorandum Of And Points Of Authorities;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 9, 2024 line 3. DEFENDANTS ALBERT WONG AND JOYCE WONG'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DISMISS FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to bring this action to trial within 5 years and Plaintiff presented no circumstances beyond the plaintiff's control, in which moving the case to trial is impracticable for all practical purposes. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 644 BROADWAY, LLC VS. CHINA LIVE VENTURES LIMITED, L.P.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 9, 2024 line 6. PLAINTIFF 644 BROADWAY, LLC'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is OFF CALENDAR.
